D:\aplikacje\cmake-4.2.0-rc1-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\engine.dir/objects.a
D:\narzedzia\MSYS2\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\engine.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\engine.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\narzedzia\MSYS2\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -Wl,-Bstatic -lpthread -Wl,-Bdynamic -shared -o C:\Users\lukas\Desktop\ox-engine\engine.dll -Wl,--out-implib,C:\Users\lukas\Desktop\ox-engine\engine.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\engine.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\engine.dir\linkLibs.rsp
